---
title: "Schwankt das noch – oder schmilzt das schon?"
subtitle: ""
author: "Rieke Ammoneit"
date: "2026-04-28"
order: 20
title-block-banner: ../images/arctic.png
title-block-banner-color: black
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    code-fold: false
    number-sections: false


---

coming soon
